scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --minify-syntax --minify-whitespace --external pg-native
scripts.build:prod: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --minify-syntax --minify-whitespace --external pg-native
scripts.test:contract: bun run scripts/test/bootstrap.ts && SEN_DB_URL=$(bun -e 'const password = process.env.SEN_CHECKIN_PG_PASSWORD; if (!password) { throw new Error("SEN_CHECKIN_PG_PASSWORD is required for contract tests"); } process.stdout.write(`postgresql://admin:${encodeURIComponent(password)}@127.0.0.1:5435/sen_checkin_test`);') bun test ./src/**/*.contract.test.ts
scripts.test:ci: bun run test:unit && bun run test:contract
